acceptance_criteria: Every numeric claim in the post is traceable to current outputs, the audit, or a cited external source.
Every figure statement is no stronger than what the current accepted figure actually shows.
The fragility section explicitly matches the current calibration comparison and does not imply stronger causal isolation than the code supports.
The post continues to distinguish institutional claims from model-derived claims.
constraints: Use content/posts/money-minsky-policy-mismatch.md, money_minsky_policy_mismatch_AUDIT.md, and the accepted experiment surface as binding sources.
If support is ambiguous, weaken the prose rather than infer stronger support.
description: Create a line-by-line claim/evidence pass over the draft. Reconfirm the current evidence chain, weaken or remove unsupported statements, and make the literature-vs-simulation boundary explicit wherever needed.
goal: Audit every quantitative statement, figure caption implication, and mechanism claim in the draft against current code, figures, and the audit.
implementation_notes: Superseded by task-017, which reframes the evidence pass as a claim-to-simulation integration task tied to the final simulation surfaces.
title: Claim-support ledger and quantitative validity pass for money-minsky-policy-mismatch
